zh.Clifton Campville, Staffordshire, Englan: 英國斯塔福爾克里夫頓 坎維爾

zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Camville於大約1220年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾克里夫頓 坎維爾時，他的父親Geoffrey de Camville47歲，母親Leuca ferch Gruffudd32歲。他於1250年與Lucy在英國斯塔福爾克里夫頓 坎維爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1260年9月29日在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾利安斯特凡享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Camville于大约1220年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾克里夫頓 坎維爾时，他的父亲Geoffrey de Camville47岁，母亲Leuca ferch Gruffudd32岁。他于1250年与Lucy在英国斯塔福爾克里夫頓 坎維爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1260年9月29日在英国威尔斯卡馬特史爾利安斯特凡享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Camville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French; English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from any of the places in Calvados and Seine-Maritime named Carville, from the Scandinavian personal name Kári + Old French ville ‘settlement’.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Ó Cearbhaill or Mac Cearbhaill, see Carroll .

variants.name: Carroll
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Ó Cearbhaill or Mac Cearbhaill ‘descendant (or son) of Cearbhall’, a personal name perhaps based on cearbh ‘hacking’ and hence originally a byname for a butcher or a fierce warrior.
English and Scottish: variant of   Carrell  .

variants.name: Garfield
meanings: English (Midlands): topographic name from Middle English gor(e), gar(e) ‘triangular piece’ + feld ‘open country, field’ (Old English gār + feld), for someone who lived by a triangular piece of land.
English: alternatively, sometimes perhaps a variant of Carville (a name of Norman origin), with excrescent final -d.
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Camville was born about 1220, in Clifton Campville, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Geoffrey de Camville, was 47 and his mother, Leuca ferch Gruffudd, was 32. He married Lucy in 1250, in Clifton Campville, Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 29 September 1260, in Llansteffan, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 41.

fr.Llansteffan, Carmarthenshire, Wales: Llansteffan, Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Camville est né environ 1220, à Clifton Campville, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Geoffrey de Camville, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Leuca ferch Gruffudd, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Lucy en 1250, à Clifton Campville, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 29 septembre 1260, à Llansteffan, Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Camville um 1220 in Clifton Campville, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Geoffrey de Camville 47 und seine Mutter Leuca ferch Gruffudd 32. Er hat 1250 in Clifton Campville, Staffordshire, England Lucy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 29. September 1260 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Llansteffan, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Camville è nato il circa 1220 nel Clifton Campville, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Geoffrey de Camville, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Leuca ferch Gruffudd, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Lucy nel 1250, nel Clifton Campville, Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 29 settembre 1260, nel Llansteffan, Carmarthenshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Camvilleが約1220年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアクリフトン カンプヴィルで生まれた時，父Geoffrey de Camvilleは47歳，母Leuca ferch Gruffuddは32歳であった。1250年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアクリフトン カンプヴィルでLucyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1260年9月29日にイギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアランステファンで41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Camville(이)가 대략 1220년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 클리프턴 캠p빌에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffrey de Camville(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Leuca ferch Gruffudd(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1250년 영국 스태퍼드실르 클리프턴 캠p빌에서 Lucy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1260년 9월 29일 영국 웨일스 카마테실르 랜스테펀에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Camville nasceu aproximadamente 1220, em Clifton Campville, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Geoffrey de Camville, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Leuca ferch Gruffudd, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Lucy em 1250, em Clifton Campville, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Camville родился около 1220 г. в местности клифтон кампвилл, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Geoffrey de Camville было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Leuca ferch Gruffudd, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Lucy в 1250 г. в местности клифтон кампвилл, стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 29 сентября 1260 г. в местности лланстеффань, кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 41 год.
